reasoning: The NIST 800-53 SI-2-a control focuses on flaw remediation, which involves identifying, reporting, and correcting system flaws. In a Kubernetes context, this can be mapped to ensuring that changes to network policies and API server configurations are logged and monitored. Kubernetes audit logging can capture such changes, and monitoring these logs can help identify and remediate flaws. NetworkPolicies are analogous to cloud network ACLs, and changes to them should be logged. Additionally, configuring the API server audit policy ensures that all relevant changes are captured.
title: Flaw Remediation - Identify, report, and correct system...
